title: GroundTruthRecord
description: Schema for ground_truth.json — machine-readable annotation of an inserted vulnerability.

cwe_id.description: CWE identifier for the vulnerability class (e.g. 'CWE-122').

spec_id.description: Identifier of the vulnerability spec used for this run.

seed.description: Integer seed used for deterministic target selection.

validation_passed.description: Whether the Validator accepted this mutation as plausible.

file.description: Source file path, relative to the source tree root.

line.description: 1-based line number of the primary mutation point.

mutation_type.description: String identifier for the mutation strategy applied.

original_fragment.description: The original source fragment before mutation.
